attributes.action: Make Poverty and Homelessness a part of the education Curriculum in Scotland
attributes.additional_details: because kids need to know about this stuff they need to know about the real world issues that people are facing and not even necessarily just adults that are facing it, its effecting our young people kids that are sleeping on the street as well or are living in temporary accommodation . in 15 years time the kids of today could be sleeping on the streets and its important that they know theres resources out there for them if they are ever facing these issues
attributes.background: we want our young people to have regular access to know about the homelessness issue thats plaguing our country right now we want the kids of today to learn about the problem and to have a better start in life for them to know and understand so they arent left in the dark about these issues

rejection.details:
Your petition is about something that the Scottish Government and Scottish Parliament is responsible for. That means that the UK Government and Parliament can't look into it. 

The Scottish Parliament has its own Public Petitions Committee. If you'd like to send your petition to the Scottish Parliament, you can find out more here: https://petitions.parliament.scot/

You may also wish to contact your local council and MSP who represent you about this issue. 

You can find the name of your local council and how to contact them here: https://www.mygov.scot/find-your-local-council

You can find the name of your local MSP and how to contact them here: https://www.parliament.scot/msps
